DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY MECHANICAL & ENGINEERING CONTRACTORS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. OFF CALENDAR PER DISMISSAL OF DEFENDANT ON 7/28/05. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR# 8189. (301/BUSCH/EH)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lisa Oberg, Esq. of McKenna, Long & Aldridge, 415-267-4175 for defendant and moving party Union Carbide Corp.
Steven Patti, Esq. of Clapper & Patti, 415-332-4262 for plaintiff and opposing party Elsie Mikell

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WITH RESPECT TO WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS EXPOSED TO UNION CARBIDE'S ASBESTOS THROUGH HIS EXPOSURE TO HAMILTON MATERIALS PRODUCTS. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF THIS MATTER WAS DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR# 8189. (301/BUSCH/EH)
